requirement_topic.en: Fingrid / DSO Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Finnish Network with Cold-Climate Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 芬兰输电/配电运营商并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz芬兰电网及寒冷气候要求
requirement_topic.zht: 芬蘭輸電/配電運營商併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz芬蘭電網及寒冷氣候要求

summary.en: Finnish electricity supply is operated by distribution system operators (DSOs) at local level, with Fingrid managing the national transmission grid and Energiavirasto overseeing the electricity market. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. Finnish conditions include extreme cold winters (down to -30°C or colder in northern Finland), which affect charger thermal ratings, enclosure heating, and cold-start performance requirements.
summary.zh: 芬兰电力供应由配电系统运营商（DSO）在地方层面运营，Fingrid管理国家输电网，Energiavirasto监管电力市场。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成配电运营商供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。芬兰条件包括极寒冬季（芬兰北部低至−30°C或更低），影响充电设备热额定值、外壳加热及冷启动性能要求。
summary.zht: 芬蘭電力供應由配電系統運營商（DSO）在地方層面運營，Fingrid管理國家輸電網，Energiavirasto監管電力市場。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成配電運營商供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。芬蘭條件包括極寒冬季（芬蘭北部低至−30°C或更低），影響充電設備熱額定值、外殼加熱及冷啟動性能要求。

standards_or_laws: Fingrid transmission grid connection requirements (for large installations)
Finnish DSO electricity network connection and project acceptance requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Finland 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. China does not have cold-climate operating requirements comparable to Finnish winter conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：芬兰230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。中国没有可与芬兰冬季条件相比的寒冷气候工作要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：芬蘭230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。中國沒有可與芬蘭冬季條件相比的寒冷氣候工作要求。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for Finnish DSO review. Critical Finland-specific gap: cold-climate performance must be documented — minimum operating temperature (typically -30°C or lower for Finnish sites), enclosure heating system, anti-condensation measures, cold-start charging behaviour, and cable/connector flexibility at low temperature are all required. For outdoor Finnish installations, IP rating suitability for freeze-thaw cycling and snow/ice ingress should be verified.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按芬兰配电运营商审查准备。芬兰特定的关键差距：须记录寒冷气候性能——最低工作温度（芬兰现场通常为−30°C或更低）、外壳加热系统、防冷凝措施、低温冷启动充电行为，以及低温下线缆/接口柔韧性均为必要条件。对于芬兰户外安装，还应验证防护等级在冻融循环及雪/冰侵入方面的适用性。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按芬蘭配電運營商審查準備。芬蘭特定的關鍵差距：須記錄寒冷氣候性能——最低工作溫度（芬蘭現場通常為−30°C或更低）、外殼加熱系統、防冷凝措施、低溫冷啟動充電行為，以及低溫下線纜/接口柔韌性均為必要條件。對於芬蘭戶外安裝，還應驗證防護等級在凍融循環及雪/冰侵入方面的適用性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require Finnish DSO project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency; cold-climate ratings are a practical mandatory requirement for Finnish outdoor installations
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Finnish DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Finland 230/400 V; no cold-climate equivalence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Finland-ready EVSE needs Finnish DSO project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Cold-climate performance down to -30°C or lower is a critical Finland-specific requirement for outdoor installations that is absent from China domestic specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向芬兰的EVSE需要芬兰配电运营商项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。对于户外安装，最低至−30°C或更低的寒冷气候性能是芬兰特定关键要求，这在中国国内规格中并无对应。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向芬蘭的EVSE需要芬蘭配電運營商項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。對於戶外安裝，最低至−30°C或更低的寒冷氣候性能是芬蘭特定關鍵要求，這在中國國內規格中並無對應。
